description_long: This is a rectangular storage box with rounded corners, featuring a fabric-like exterior in a muted yellow color with vertical red and gray stripes. The box has a removable flat lid that fits snugly over the top, with visible stitching along the edges, giving it a handcrafted appearance. On one side, there is a small metallic or plastic label holder, suggesting it is designed for easy identification of contents. The box appears lightweight and is likely constructed from cardboard or a similar rigid material, covered in decorative fabric. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and the surface has a matte, slightly textured finish. This type of storage box is commonly used for organizing items in homes, offices, or garages, and is suitable for placement on shelves or in closets.
description: A fabric-covered rectangular storage box with rounded corners, vertical stripes, and a removable flat lid. It features a label holder on one side and a matte, textured finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped fabric pattern and the rounded edges of the box, with no visible label holder or fasteners.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the same striped pattern, with visible stitching or rivets along the back seam, and no label holder.
description_view_2: Side view featuring the label holder prominently on the lower center, with the same striped fabric and rounded corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to the rear, showing the striped pattern and seam details, but no label holder.
